com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleBooleanVerifier

Packages that use ExtensibleBooleanVerifier 
Package Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of core Java types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal
Design guide
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension  

  • Uses of ExtensibleBooleanVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

    Subinterfaces of ExtensibleBooleanVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java 
    Modifier and Type Interface Description
    interface  BooleanVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a boolean value.
    interface  PrimitiveBooleanVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a primitive boolean value.

  • Uses of ExtensibleBooleanVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

    Classes in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal that implement ExtensibleBooleanVerifier 
    Modifier and Type Class Description
    class  BooleanVerifierImpl
    Default implementation of BooleanVerifier.
    class  BooleanVerifierNoOp
    A BooleanVerifier that does nothing.
    class  PrimitiveBooleanVerifierImpl
    Default implementation of PrimitiveBooleanVerifier.
    class  PrimitiveBooleanVerifierNoOp
    A PrimitiveBooleanVerifier that does nothing.

  • Uses of ExtensibleBooleanVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension

    Classes in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension that implement ExtensibleBooleanVerifier 
    Modifier and Type Class Description
    class  AbstractBooleanVerifier<S,​V extends ExtensibleBooleanValidator<V>>
    An implementation of ExtensibleBooleanVerifier.
